title: Logo round 2 — bulb × bubble combined (generated by Opus 4.8)
prompt: You asked to combine Classic bulb + Idea in a bubble; generation was delegated to Opus 4.8 per your model pick, tuned to your dials (very playful, very organic, detailed). Six composition concepts — pick the keepers, note tweaks, mark ⚡ remix pairs.

options.label: Bulb in a Bubble
options.description: A friendly lightbulb tucked inside a wobbly speech bubble with a bounced tail.
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M7 21C7 12 14 7 24 7C34 7 41 12 41 21C41 29 34 34 25 34C22 34 20 34 18 33L11 40L13 32C9 30 7 26 7 21Z"/><path d="M24 12C19 12 16 16 18 20C19 22 20 23 20 25L28 25C28 23 29 22 30 20C32 16 29 12 24 12Z" stroke="#a855f7"/><path d="M21 26L27 26M22 29L26 29" stroke="#a855f7"/><path d="M22 20C23 18 25 18 26 20" stroke="#a855f7"/></svg>

options.label: Bulb Speaks Up
options.description: A little bulb piping out its own chat bubble with a glowing idea dot.
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M20 14C14 14 11 19 13 23C14 25 16 26 16 29L24 29C24 26 26 25 27 23C29 19 26 14 20 14Z"/><path d="M17 29L23 29M18 32L22 32"/><path d="M18 23C19 21 21 21 22 23" stroke="#a855f7"/><path d="M31 7C37 6 42 9 41 14C40 18 34 19 31 16L27 18L30 14C29 11 29 9 31 7Z" stroke="#a855f7"/><circle cx="35" cy="12" r="1.3" fill="#a855f7" stroke="none"/><path d="M20 9L20 6M11 13L9 11M29 12L31 10" stroke="#d8b4fe"/></svg>

options.label: One Shape, Both
options.description: A single silhouette where the bulb's base becomes the speech-bubble tail.
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M24 7C16 7 10 13 10 20C10 26 15 31 19 31L19 34L24 40L29 34L29 31C33 31 38 26 38 20C38 13 32 7 24 7Z"/><path d="M20 34L28 34M21 37L27 37" stroke="#a855f7"/><path d="M19 22C20 26 28 26 29 22" stroke="#a855f7"/><circle cx="24" cy="18" r="1.5" fill="#a855f7" stroke="none"/></svg>

options.label: Idea Meets Chat
options.description: A bulb and a speech bubble overlapping and kissing like two ideas in conversation.
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M17 9C11 9 8 14 9 18C10 21 12 22 12 25L22 25C22 22 24 21 25 18C26 14 23 9 17 9Z"/><path d="M14 25L20 25M15 28L19 28"/><path d="M14 17C15 15 19 15 20 17" stroke="#a855f7"/><path d="M31 13C37 12 42 15 41 21C40 27 33 29 28 26L24 29L26 24C25 20 27 15 31 13Z" stroke="#a855f7"/><circle cx="35" cy="20" r="1.3" fill="#a855f7" stroke="none"/></svg>

options.label: Glowing Bubble
options.description: A speech bubble that lights up like a bulb, with filament, idea spark and soft rays.
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M9 20C9 12 16 8 24 8C33 8 40 13 40 21C40 27 35 31 29 32C27 32 25 32 23 31L18 39L19 31C13 29 9 25 9 20Z"/><path d="M18 22C19 26 27 26 28 22" stroke="#a855f7"/><circle cx="23" cy="17" r="1.5" fill="#a855f7" stroke="none"/><path d="M24 5L24 7M40 10L42 8M8 10L6 8" stroke="#d8b4fe"/></svg>

options.label: Rising Ideas
options.description: A bulb sending up a rising stack of round thought bubbles, the top one holding a spark.
